scene.description: A vibrant 3D isometric illustration featuring a central stylized letter i formed by blue geometric blocks, surrounded by a hexagonal arrangement of additional isometric blocks with gradient colors and white outline icons. Dynamic colored dashed lines and small dots extend from the perimeter. The graphic sits on a completely flat, uniform background with NO drop shadow, NO soft ground shadow, NO ambient occlusion blob, and NO darkening under the cluster; the background is perfectly clean and solid. Keep normal 3D face lighting on the cubes (faceted shading) only.

background.description: A plain, uniform white background providing clear contrast for the colorful central graphic.

elements.description: Small isometric cube forming the dot of the central 'i'.
elements.details: Part of a larger blue 'i' structure, top component, features blue gradient.

elements.description: Tall isometric rectangular prism forming the stem of the central 'i'.
elements.details: Part of a larger blue 'i' structure, middle component, wider at the bottom, features blue gradient.

elements.description: Isometric inverted trapezoidal prism or wedge, forming the base/foot of the central 'i'.
elements.details: Part of a larger blue 'i' structure, bottom component, features blue gradient.

elements.description: Isometric cube situated directly above the 'i' dot, at the top position of the surrounding hexagonal pattern.
elements.details: Solid blue gradient cube, no icon inside.

elements.description: Isometric cube with an orange-pink gradient, positioned at the top-right of the central cluster.
elements.details: Features an orange to pink gradient, contains a white outline icon of an open book.

elements.description: Simple white outline icon of an open book, centered on the visible front face of the top-right orange-pink cube (Element 5).
Isometric cube with an orange-pink gradient, positioned at the middle-right of the central cluster.
elements.details: Features an orange to pink gradient, contains a white outline icon of a cogwheel/gear.

elements.description: Simple white outline icon of a cogwheel or gear, centered on the visible front face of the mid-right orange-pink cube (Element 7).
Isometric cube situated directly below the 'i' base, at the bottom position of the surrounding hexagonal pattern.
elements.details: Solid blue gradient cube, no icon inside.

elements.description: Isometric cube with a green-teal gradient, positioned at the middle-left of the central cluster.
elements.details: Features a teal to green gradient, contains a white outline icon of a bottle.

elements.description: Simple white outline icon of a bottle (possibly for beverages or liquids), centered on the visible front face of the mid-left green-teal cube (Element 10).
Isometric cube with a green-teal gradient, positioned at the top-left of the central cluster.
elements.details: Features a teal to green gradient, contains a white outline icon of a t-shirt.

elements.description: Simple white outline icon of a t-shirt, centered on the visible front face of the top-left green-teal cube (Element 12).
Two wavy blue dashed line segments extending from the top-left of the cluster, each ending with a small solid blue dot.
Two wavy green dashed line segments extending from the mid-left of the cluster, each ending with a small solid green dot.
Two wavy orange dashed line segments extending from the mid-right of the cluster, each ending with a small solid orange dot.
Two wavy light green dashed line segments extending from the top-right of the cluster, each ending with a small solid light green dot.
